# Intro:*Created: Monday, June 15, 2020 at 5:52:11?PM*<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1>Intro: </h1></font></div>
<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1>Thank you for meeting me, I know you are busy and I appreciate it. How have things been for you during Covid? </h1></font></div>
<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1><br></h1></font></div>
<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1>I wanted to meet with you and update you on my current progress at SurveyMonkey. </h1></font></div>
<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1><br></h1></font></div>
<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1>I will never forget when you connected the dots during our interview and said my ŇCustomer centricÓ experience would be an asset in the sales role and you know what you were right! </h1></font></div>
<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1><br></h1></font></div>
<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1>I am hoping you can help me out again. </h1></font></div>
<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1><br></h1></font></div>
<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1>For example, my AEŐs have been trusting me with taking their discovery calls, last quarter ,I was able to achieve 100% qualification rate and during the first 2 months of COVID I was able to achieve over 100% quota. </h1></font></div>
<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1><br></h1></font></div>
<div><font face=".AppleSystemUIFont"><h1>My goal since the very beginning has been to become an Account Executive and I wanted to reach to you for guidance. What skills, trades do you think would be beneficial to get there. </h1></font><b><h1><br></h1></b></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Really good Account Executives how what</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Less anxious as an AE</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Slow down my speech</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>What makes a  Account Executive </div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Process and Strengths, Sandler, seasoned, each conversation you leave or GOLD nuggets, information they share, who else theyŐd recommend I speak to, information. </div>
<div><br></div>
<div>I admire Parker, appreciate him taking the timeout, what he would recommend. Share with you insights from what is happening here. Perspective - Mid- market </div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Harrison on Thur, Parker the following week and Steve the following week. </div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br></div>
